lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Welcome to the Cloak and Stagger! Anything I can get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to order a drink, please.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Of course, what would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got anything special on tap?

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: We're always running a keg of our locally-brewed ale, Lizardkicker.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: I will warn you though, its an acquired taste.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's in it?

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Oh, the usual... Wheat, hops, yeast...

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: ...reptile scales...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Scales?!

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Don't worry about the scales.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Was there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: This here is the Cloak and Stagger. The finest drinking establishment in the whole of Shayzien.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't it the only pub in the city?

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Like I say, the finest in all of Shayzien!

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Most of our patrons are soldiers returning on leave from the frontlines. We do get a few regular folk in too though.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: By the way, its generally considered polite to buy a drink if you're going to stand around and chat.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: ...With that said, is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you heard any rumours here?

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Apparently Veos is looking for some help with something. He hangs around the docks of Port Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: They say there's trouble in Port Piscarilius. Something about gangs uniting. Might be worth looking into.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: I hear that Lord Hosidius has misplaced one of his sons. The Hosidius family might pay a lot to see him returned safely.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Phileas Rimor has supposedly been looking for some assistance with something in Shayzien. Maybe worth investigating.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: I hear that the rulers of Lovakengj have some work available. You'll find them in the Lovakengj Assembly.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Apparently there's been some commotion in the middle of Arceuus. Might be worth checking out.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: That protest outside Kourend Castle is starting to attract some attention. Could be worth taking a look.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I need to be going.

lines.speaker: Sheryl
lines.text: Safe travels!
